description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a tall, uniform green fence, creating a private enclosure. The structure features a central entrance pathway lined with several large, leafy trees, leading to a prominent front door. The roof appears flat with multiple skylights and small rooftop structures, suggesting modern amenities and possible outdoor spaces. The property includes a mix of paved and landscaped areas, with visible outdoor seating and garden features. Windows are distributed across the facade, providing natural light and views to the outside. The overall design is modern, with clean lines, a neutral color palette, and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a tall green fence and landscaped with trees and garden features. The design emphasizes privacy, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tree-lined pathway, and the central door framed by landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fence, the arrangement of trees, and the flat roof with visible skylights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, additional outdoor spaces, and the overall layout of the bungalow within the fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the fence, more trees, and the distribution of windows and outdoor features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
